Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week compared to when followed directly by SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Declined in cases where no SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the final reviewer assignment (last SW-Reviewer Agreed before SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Selection is now due across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases leading to SW-EIC Accept versus those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer No Response in variants where reviewer engagement fails
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in complex revision trajectories involving multiple rounds
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to be followed by any reviewer response (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late in delayed review paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the completion of the entire reviewer assignment phase (i.e., last SW-AE Assign Reviewers before transition to decision stage)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'
